prompt: I opened Safari to test my web app at localhost:3000. The page should show a login form with username and password fields. Can you verify it looks right?

assertions.text: uses_screenshot_script: Agent executed screenshot.py via shell
reads_image_file: Agent used the Read tool on a .png file
evaluates_specific_elements: Agent mentions login form, username, or password fields specifically
handles_missing_app_gracefully: Agent still evaluates what IS visible rather than refusing to work
